name: Hephaestus
description:
__Race:__ God
__Height:__ 165 cm (5'5")
__Affiliation:__ Hephaestus Familia

Hephaestus is the head of the Hephaestus Familia. Hephaestus shows a strict and hardworking nature compared to her friend, Hestia, who was known as the lazy goddess. She is also known to care very much about her children.

As a Goddess of Smithing, Hephaestus is a master at it. She was able to smith the Hestia Knife, a living weapon with Hestia's falna, even without her arcanum.
